name: Flank Steak Creole
recipeInstructions:
1. Score one side of the meat.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Combine chopped green pepper, onion, 1 tablespoon tomato paste, horseradish, sugar, 1/2 cup water, and stuffing mix in a bowl.
4. Spoon the stuffing mixture down the middle of the unscored side of the flank steak.
5. Fold the ends over and overlap the long sides; skewer together.
6. Place on a metal rack or trivet in the crockpot.
7. Cover and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours.
8. Remove the meat and turn the control to high.
9. Dissolve cornstarch in 1/4 cup cold water; stir in 1 tablespoon tomato paste.
10. Add to juices in the pot.
11. Cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
12. Slice steak across the grain.
13. Pass sauce with the steak.
